mapper.select:
select * from t_schedule_job_log where log_id in
#{logId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_schedule_job_log ( log_id, job_id, bean_name, method_name, params, status, error, times, create_time ) values ( #{logId}, #{jobId}, #{beanName}, #{methodName}, #{params}, #{status}, #{error}, #{times}, #{createTime} )
mapper.delete:
delete from t_schedule_job_log where log_id in
#{logId}
